# 

# **1\. Tổng quan hệ thống & Yêu cầu phần cứng khuyến nghị** {#1.-tổng-quan-hệ-thống-&-yêu-cầu-phần-cứng-khuyến-nghị}

Kiến trúc chính:

Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS (khuyến nghị)  
Docker \+ Docker Compose  
Nginx → Reverse Proxy & static file serving  
Janus → WebRTC SFU  
Wowza → Streaming server (VOD \+ live)  
SeaweedFS → Object storage phân tán  
PostgreSQL (multi-db), MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch  
Các microservices: school, social, lms, examination (room-state), edge-service

Cấu hình máy chủ tối thiểu / khuyến nghị (2025-2026):

Thành phầnTối thiểuKhuyến nghị (50-150 users đồng thời)CPU6 coresi5-12400 / Ryzen 5 5600X trở lênRAM16 GB32 GBSSD512 GB1 TB NVMeNIC2 cổng Gigabit2 cổng Gigabit (1 ra Internet, 1 nội bộ)Nguồn500W650W

2\. Chuẩn bị trước khi cài đặt

Máy chủ đã cài Ubuntu Server 22.04 (clean install)  
Có quyền root hoặc sudo  
2 cổng mạng vật lý (eno1 → Internet, eno2 → mạng nội bộ trường)  
Router nội bộ hỗ trợ custom DNS (ví dụ: Ruijie Reyee RG-EW3000GX PRO)  
Tài khoản truy cập private registry: registry.edulive.net  
Link Google Drive chứa resource cài đặt đầu tiên  
IP tĩnh nội bộ dự kiến cho server (ví dụ: 192.168.10.234)  
Tên domain local mong muốn (ví dụ: school.edu, edu.demo, whoami.edu)

1. # **System Prep** {#system-prep}

   1. ## **Ubuntu system tuning** {#ubuntu-system-tuning}

![][image3]  
Mở file */etc/security/limits.conf*  với editor hay sử dung (nano, vim) với quyền root  
Thêm vào cuối 2 dòng này

\* soft nofile 65536  
\* hard nofile 65536

Đăng xuất khỏi user hiện tại và đăng nhập lại . Kiểm tra bằng câu lệnh ở terminal  
*ulimit \-n*

Mở file */etc/sysctl.conf* bằng quyền root  
Tìm dong fs.file-max (nếu không có thì thêm mới)

*fs.file-max \= 100000*

2. ## **Cài đặt dns local** {#cài-đặt-dns-local}

## **1\. Vô hiệu hóa systemd-resolved bằng các lệnh dưới đây:** {#1.-vô-hiệu-hóa-systemd-resolved-bằng-các-lệnh-dưới-đây:}

*sudo systemctl disable systemd-resolved*  
*sudo systemctl stop systemd-resolved*  
Bạn cũng phải xóa tệp cấu hình cho systemd-resolved và bạn có thể sử dụng các lệnh dưới đây.  
*sudo unlink /etc/resolv.conf*  
*sudo rm \-rf /etc/resolv.conf*  
Sau khi xóa cấu hình, bạn cần tạo một tệp mới và thêm DNS của Google.  
*echo “nameserver 8.8.8.8” | sudo tee /etc/resolv.conf*

## **2\. Cài đặt dnsmasq** {#2.-cài-đặt-dnsmasq}

sudo apt update && sudo apt install dnsmasq \-y

## **3\. Cấu hình cho local domain** {#3.-cấu-hình-cho-local-domain}

	sudo nano /etc/dnsmasq.d/local-dns.conf

Thêm nội dung sau 

listen-address={server static ip}

bind-dynamic

no-resolv

domain={local dns}

address=/{local dns}/{server static ip}

domain=whoami.edu

address=/whoami.edu/{server static ip}

Thay {server static ip} bằng ip static của server {local dns} bằng tên domain muốn cài đặt và khởi động lại dnsmasq.service

	sudo systemctl restart dnsmasq.service    
(Các tài liệu config sẽ lấy ví dụ loca dns \= [server.edu](http://server.edu) và static ip \= 192.168.10.88)

## **4\. Trên cấu hình router cần thêm các cài đặt dns** {#4.-trên-cấu-hình-router-cần-thêm-các-cài-đặt-dns}

![][image4]

![][image5]

# **III. Cài đặt docker**  {#iii.-cài-đặt-docker}

## **1\. Cập nhật hệ thống** {#1.-cập-nhật-hệ-thống}

Các bạn tiến hành cập nhật các gói (package) đã được cài đặt trên hệ thống Ubuntu bằng lệnh:

sudo apt update \-y && apt upgrade \-y

## **2\. Cài đặt Docker** {#2.-cài-đặt-docker}

Để cài đặt bản Docker mới nhất, các bạn nên cài đặt trực tiếp từ kho lưu trữ của Docker.

* Cài đặt một số gói cho phép sử dụng HTTPS.

sudo apt install apt-transport-https ca-certificates curl software-properties-common

* Thêm khóa GPG của kho lưu trữ Docker.

curl \-fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg \--dearmor \-o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg

* Bây giờ hãy thêm kho lưu trữ Docker của Ubuntu 22.04 ( *jammy*) vào các *apt* sources.

echo "deb \[arch=$(dpkg \--print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg\] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(lsb\_release \-cs) stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list \> /dev/null

* Cập nhật packages và thiết lập để cài đặt Docker từ kho lưu trữ chính thức.

sudo apt update

sudo apt-cache policy docker-ce

* Cài đặt Docker

sudo apt install docker-ce \-y

* Kiểm tra trạng thái của Docker

sudo systemctl status docker

# **IV. Cài đặt các services cần thiết** {#iv.-cài-đặt-các-services-cần-thiết}

Tải tài nguyên cần thiết cho lần cài đặt đầu tiên ở địa chỉ

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/16IoNF\_0CRyRvGSzvRv6JTvO\_3n5QSDAn/view?usp=share\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16IoNF_0CRyRvGSzvRv6JTvO_3n5QSDAn/view?usp=share_link)  
Và update lên server để phục vụ cài đặt

## **1\. Cài đặt edulive Edge Service**  {#1.-cài-đặt-edulive-edge-service}

- Tạo folder chứa service

 	sudo mkdir \-p /opt/services/edulive

- Tạo user để chạy dịch vụ

  sudo useradd \-r \-s /bin/false appedu

- Copy file edulive-server-control vào thư mục /opt/services/edulive 

  sudo cp \-f /path/to/edulvie-install-resource/edulive-server-control /opt/services/edulive

- Cấp quyền cho user chạy

  sudo chown \-R appedu:appedu /opt/services/edulive

- Tạo service với nội dung 

	sudo nano /etc/systemd/system/edulive.service

	\[Unit\]

Description=Edge Server Control Service

After=network.target

\[Service\]

Type=simple

User=eduliveapp

Group=eduliveapp

\# Working directory

WorkingDirectory=/opt/services/edulive

\# Binary path

ExecStart=/opt/services/edulive/edge-server-control

\# Restart policy

Restart=always

RestartSec=5

\# Environment variables (optional)

\# Logs

StandardOutput=journal

StandardError=journal

\# Security hardening (recommended)

NoNewPrivileges=true

PrivateTmp=true

ProtectSystem=full

ProtectHome=true

\[Install\]

WantedBy=multi-user.target

- Reload lại systemd và khởi động dịch vụ

  sudo systemctl daemon-reload

  sudo systemctl enable edulive.service

  sudo systemctl start edulive.service

- Kiểm tra lại dịch vụ

  sudo systemctl status edulive.service


## **2\. Cài đặt các dịch vụ của Edulive** {#2.-cài-đặt-các-dịch-vụ-của-edulive}

sudo mv \-fR /path/to/edulvie-install-resource/ /docker 

### **a. Cấu hình private docker registry** {#a.-cấu-hình-private-docker-registry}

- Sửa file /etc/hosts

Thêm dòng 123.31.43.25 registry.edulive.net

- Đăng nhập docker registry

	sudo docker login [registry.edulive.net](http://registry.edulive.net) với tài khoản trong phụ lục tài khoản

	Đăng nhập thành công sẽ có thông báo Login Succeeded ở terminal

### **b. Tải các docker images cần thiết cho cài đặt** {#b.-tải-các-docker-images-cần-thiết-cho-cài-đặt}

sudo docker pull [registry.edulive.net/janus\_server:latest](http://registry.edulive.net/janus_server:latest)

sudo docker pull registry.edulive.net/school-service:latest

sudo docker pull [registry.edulive.net/wowza-streaming-offline:latest](http://registry.edulive.net/wowza-streaming-offline:latest)

Sudo docker pull [registry.edulive.net/dev/examination](http://registry.edulive.net/dev/examination):latest

Sudo docker pull registry.edulive.net/dev/lms:latest

	Sudo docker pull [registry.edulive.net/dev/social:latest](http://registry.edulive.net/dev/social:latest)

	Sudo docker pull [registry.edulive.net/postgres:17.5-alpine](http://registry.edulive.net/postgres:17.5-alpine)

	Sudo docker pull **registry.edulive.net/docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:9.0.2**

	Sudo docker pull otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:latest

### **c. Cài đặt các dịch vụ** {#c.-cài-đặt-các-dịch-vụ}

- **Cài đặt Janus**

		Cd /docker/janus

	 	docker compose up \-d

- **Cài đặt nginx**

+ Sửa cấu hình nginx ở /docker/nginx/conf.d 

 Replace domain name về {local dns} đã cài đặt ở bước II \- 3

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/lib.conf

server {

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name {local dns}*;*

   access\_log /var/log/nginx/lib\_access.log*;*

   location /edulive\_draw/ {

       alias /room-state/data/edulive\_draw/*;*

       access\_log off*;*

       expires 30d*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public"*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600*;*

       if ($request\_method \= OPTIONS) {

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

   }

}

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/room-state.conf

*\# \--- Compression \---*

gzip\_min\_length 1024*;*

gzip\_proxied any*;*

gzip\_vary on*;*

gzip\_buffers 16 8k*;*

gzip\_types text/plain text/css application/json application/javascript text/xml application/xml application/xml+rss text/javascript*;*

*\# \--- Proxy buffering defaults \---*

proxy\_buffering on*;*

proxy\_buffers 16 16k*;*

proxy\_busy\_buffers\_size 64k*;*

proxy\_max\_temp\_file\_size 512m*;*

proxy\_cache\_path /var/cache/nginx/fonts levels=1:2 keys\_zone=fonts\_cache:200m max\_size=5g inactive=1y use\_temp\_path=off*;*

*\# \--- Upstream (backend) \---*

upstream room-state {

   server 0.0.0.0:7070*;*

   keepalive 16*;*

}

*\# \--- Server block \---*

server {

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name {local dns} {static ip}*;*

   charset utf-8*;*

   client\_max\_body\_size 2G*;*

   client\_body\_timeout 600s*;*

   send\_timeout 600s*;*

   keepalive\_timeout 600s*;*

   location \= /\_cache\_test.html {

       return 204*;*

   }

   access\_log /var/log/nginx/room\_state\_access.log*;*

   error\_log  /var/log/nginx/room\_state\_error.log*;*

   location /ping {

   default\_type text/plain*;*

       return 200 "pong"*;*

   } 


   *\# \---------------------- Google Fonts CSS proxy \----------------------*

   location /gfonts/ {

       resolver 8.8.8.8 ipv6=off*;*

   	 proxy\_pass https://fonts.googleapis.com/*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host fonts.googleapis.com*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_ssl\_server\_name on*;*

       proxy\_ssl\_name fonts.googleapis.com*;*

       proxy\_cache fonts\_cache*;*

       proxy\_cache\_valid 200 1y*;*

       proxy\_cache\_valid any 1d*;*

       proxy\_cache\_use\_stale error timeout updating http\_500 http\_502 http\_503 http\_504*;*

       proxy\_cache\_lock on*;*

       proxy\_cache\_lock\_timeout 10s*;*

       proxy\_cache\_background\_update on*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Accept-Encoding ""*;*

       gunzip on*;*

       sub\_filter\_types text/css*;*

       sub\_filter\_once off*;*

       sub\_filter "https://fonts.gstatic.com/" "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://fonts.gstatic.com/"  "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

       sub\_filter "//fonts.googleapis.com/"    "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"*;*

       proxy\_connect\_timeout 30s*;*

       proxy\_send\_timeout 60s*;*

       proxy\_read\_timeout 60s*;*

   }

   *\# \---------------------- Google Static (font files) \----------------------*

   location /gstatic/ {

   resolver 8.8.8.8 ipv6=off*;*

       proxy\_pass https://fonts.gstatic.com/*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host fonts.gstatic.com*;*

       proxy\_ssl\_server\_name on*;*

       proxy\_ssl\_name fonts.gstatic.com*;*

       proxy\_cache fonts\_cache*;*

       proxy\_cache\_valid 200 1y*;*

       proxy\_cache\_use\_stale error timeout updating http\_500 http\_502 http\_503 http\_504*;*

       proxy\_cache\_lock on*;*

       proxy\_cache\_lock\_timeout 10s*;*

       proxy\_cache\_background\_update on*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable"*;*

       access\_log off*;*

   }

   *\# \---------------------- Local CDN fonts (served from disk) \----------------------*

   location /cdn/fonts/ {

       alias /statics/fonts/*;*

       access\_log off*;*

       expires 30d*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public"*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600*;*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       sub\_filter\_types text/css application/javascript text/plain*;*

       sub\_filter\_once off*;*

       sub\_filter "https://cdn.edulive.net/"       "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://cdn.edulive.net/"        "http://{local dns}/"*;*

       sub\_filter "https://betacdn.edulive.net/"   "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://betacdn.edulive.net/"    "http://{local dns}/"*;*

   }

   *\# \---------------------- Serve /data/ files from disk \----------------------*

   location ^\~ /data/ {

       root /room-state*;*

       disable\_symlinks off*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600*;*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       try\_files $uri $uri/ \=404*;*

       expires 1d*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=604800, immutable"*;*

       client\_max\_body\_size 2G*;*

       client\_body\_timeout 600s*;*

       send\_timeout 600s*;*

       keepalive\_timeout 600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache max=10000 inactive=600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_valid 300s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_min\_uses 2*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_errors on*;*

       *\# content replacement for in-file references*

       sub\_filter\_types text/css application/javascript text/plain*;*

       sub\_filter\_once off*;*

       sub\_filter "https://fonts.googleapis.com/"     "http://{local dns}/gfonts/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://fonts.googleapis.com/"      "http://{local dns}/gfonts/"*;*

       sub\_filter "https://cdn.edulive.net/"          "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://cdn.edulive.net/"           "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "https://betacdn.edulive.net/"      "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://betacdn.edulive.net/"       "http://{local dns}/cdn/"*;*

       sub\_filter "https://fonts.gstatic.com/"        "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

       sub\_filter "http://fonts.gstatic.com/"         "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

   sub\_filter "//fonts.googleapis.com/"           "http://{local dns}/gstatic/"*;*

   }

   *\# \---------------------- Serve /media/ files \----------------------*

   location ^\~ /room-state/media/ {

       alias /room-state/media/*;*

       try\_files $uri $uri/ \=404*;*

       autoindex on*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600*;*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       expires 1d*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=604800, immutable"*;*

       client\_max\_body\_size 2G*;*

       client\_body\_timeout 600s*;*

       send\_timeout 600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache max=10000 inactive=600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_valid 300s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_min\_uses 2*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_errors on*;*

   }

   location ^\~ /media/ {

       alias /room-state/media/*;*

       try\_files $uri $uri/ \=404*;*

   autoindex on*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600*;*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       expires 1d*;*

       add\_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=604800, immutable"*;*

       client\_max\_body\_size 2G*;*

       client\_body\_timeout 600s*;*

       send\_timeout 600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache max=10000 inactive=600s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_valid 300s*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_min\_uses 2*;*

       open\_file\_cache\_errors on*;*

   }

   *\# \---------------------- Proxy to backend for all other requests \----------------------*

   location / {

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP       $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host            $host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

       proxy\_connect\_timeout 600s*;*

       proxy\_send\_timeout    600s*;*

       proxy\_read\_timeout    600s*;*

       send\_timeout          600s*;*

       proxy\_pass http://room-state*;*

       proxy\_buffering on*;*

   }

}

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/school.conf

server {

   listen \[::\]:80*;*

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name school-api.{local dns}*;*

   location / {

       proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:8002*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

   }

}

server {

    listen \[::\]:80*;*

    listen 80*;*

    server\_name school.{local dns}*;*

    location / {

        proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:3303*;*

    proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

    proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

        proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

        proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

    }

}

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/social.conf

server {

   listen 80*;*

   listen \[::\]:80*;*

   server\_name social.{local dns}*;*

   location / {

       proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:3304*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

       proxy\_hide\_header X-Frame-Options*;*

       add\_header Content-Security-Policy "frame-ancestors 'self' http://school.{local dns}"*;*

   }

}

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/storage.conf

upstream minio\_local {

    server 0.0.0.0:8888*;*

}

map $http\_origin $cors\_origin {

   default ""*;*

   "http://{local dns}" "http://{local dns}"*;*

   "http://school.{local dns}" "http://school.{local dns}"*;*

   "http://school-api.{local dns}" "http://school-api.{local dns}"*;*

   "http://{local dns}" "http://{local dns}"*;*

   "http://social.{local dns}" "http://social.{local dns}"*;*

}

server {

   listen \[::\]:80*;*

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name storage.{local dns}*;*

   ignore\_invalid\_headers off*;*

   client\_max\_body\_size 0*;*

   proxy\_buffering off*;*

   proxy\_request\_buffering off*;*

   proxy\_hide\_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin*;*

   proxy\_hide\_header Access-Control-Allow-Methods*;*

   proxy\_hide\_header Access-Control-Allow-Headers*;*

   proxy\_hide\_header Access-Control-Max-Age*;*

   proxy\_hide\_header Access-Control-Allow-Credentials*;*

   location /lms {

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, PATCH, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600 always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0 always*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain charset=UTF-8' always*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       rewrite ^/lms(.\*)$ $1 break*;*

       proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:8083*;*

       proxy\_http\_version 1.1*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

   }

   location /social {

       *\# Specific OPTIONS handling for /social to ensure preflight requests are managed*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, PATCH, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600 always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0 always*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain charset=UTF-8' always*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       rewrite ^/social(.\*)$ $1 break*;*

       proxy\_pass http://127.0.0.1:8082*;*

       proxy\_http\_version 1.1*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

   }

   location / {

       *\# Handle OPTIONS preflight requests for the root location*

       if ($request\_method \= 'OPTIONS') {

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Max-Age' 3600 always*;*

           add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Credentials' 'true' always*; \# Add this if your client sends credentials (e.g., cookies, HTTP auth)*

           add\_header 'Content-Length' 0 always*;*

           add\_header 'Content-Type' 'text/plain charset=UTF-8' always*;*

           return 204*;*

       }

   add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' "\*" always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods' 'GET, POST, OPTIONS, PUT, DELETE' always*;*

       add\_header 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers' 'Authorization, Content-Type, Origin' always*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Host $http\_host*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP $remote\_addr*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy\_add\_x\_forwarded\_for*;*

       proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme*;*

       proxy\_connect\_timeout 300*;*

       proxy\_http\_version 1.1*;*

       proxy\_set\_header Connection ""*;*

   proxy\_request\_buffering on*;*

   proxy\_buffering on*;*

   chunked\_transfer\_encoding on*;*

       set $new\_path /dev-esocial$uri*;*

       proxy\_pass http://minio\_local$new\_path*;*

   *\#proxy\_pass http://minio\_local/dev-esocial$request\_uri;*

   }

}

File /docker/nginx/conf.d/wowza.conf

upstream wowza-web {

  server 127.0.0.1:1935*;*

}

upstream wowza-manager {

  server 127.0.0.1:18088*;*

}

server {

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name player.{local dns}.edu*;*

   access\_log /var/log/nginx/edulive\_wowza\_web\_ssl\_access.log*;*

   error\_log /var/log/nginx/edulive\_wowza\_web\_ssl\_error.log*;*

   location / {

      proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP  $remote\_addr*;*

      proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $remote\_addr*;*

      proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

      proxy\_pass http://wowza-web*;*

   }

}

server {

   listen 80*;*

   server\_name player-admin.{local dns}.edu*;*

   access\_log /var/log/nginx/edulive\_wowza\_admin\_ssl\_access.log*;*

   location / {

      proxy\_set\_header X-Real-IP  $remote\_addr*;*

      proxy\_set\_header X-Forwarded-For $remote\_addr*;*

      proxy\_set\_header Host $host*;*

      proxy\_pass http://wowza-manager*;*

   }

}

+ Khởi động dịch vụ nginx

Cd /docker/nginx

	Docker compose up \-d	

- # **Cài đặt dịch vụ school backend** {#cài-đặt-dịch-vụ-school-backend}

	Sửa cấu hình ở .env và compose.yaml. Ghi đè {local domain} bằng domain cài đặt ở bước II \- 3 và ip là static ip trong cài đặt dns local

+ File .env

  APP\_NAME=Laravel

  APP\_ENV=local

  APP\_KEY=base64:te7Ak+m9xJDbuN2wKofnka89tcr5iRsSFR13376vMVk=

  APP\_DEBUG=true

  APP\_URL=http://host.docker.internal:8002

  APP\_PORT=8002

  STORAGE\_PUBLIC\_URL=http://{static ip}:8002

  APP\_LOCALE=en

  APP\_FALLBACK\_LOCALE=en

  APP\_FAKER\_LOCALE=en\_US

  APP\_MAINTENANCE\_DRIVER=file

  \# APP\_MAINTENANCE\_STORE=database

  PHP\_CLI\_SERVER\_WORKERS=4

  BCRYPT\_ROUNDS=12

  LOG\_CHANNEL=stack

  LOG\_STACK=single

  LOG\_DEPRECATIONS\_CHANNEL=null

  LOG\_LEVEL=debug

  DB\_CONNECTION=pgsql

  DB\_HOST=school-api.{local dns}

  DB\_PORT=15432

  DB\_DATABASE=school

  DB\_USERNAME=edulive

  DB\_PASSWORD=edulive@123def

  MONGODB\_HOST=school-mongo

  MONGODB\_PORT=27017

  MONGODB\_USERNAME=school

  MONGODB\_PASSWORD=U3WwQGJBP9A0MOLzWyR0f8T5

  MONGODB\_DATABASE=school

  MONGODB\_FORWARD\_PORT=27117

  MONGODB\_URI="mongodb://school:U3WwQGJBP9A0MOLzWyR0f8T5@school-mongo:27017/school?authSource=admin"

  ES\_AUTH\_TYPE=http

  ES\_HOSTS="http://125.212.229.11:19200"

  ES\_USERNAME=

  ES\_PASSWORD=

  ES\_CLOUD\_ID=

  ES\_API\_ID=

  ES\_API\_KEY=

  ES\_SSL\_CA=

  ES\_INDEX\_PREFIX=school\_

  ES\_SSL\_CERT=

  ES\_SSL\_CERT\_PASSWORD=

  ES\_SSL\_KEY=

  ES\_SSL\_KEY\_PASSWORD=

  ES\_OPT\_ID\_SORTABLE=false

  ES\_OPT\_VERIFY\_SSL=false

  ES\_OPT\_RETRIES=

  ES\_OPT\_META\_HEADERS=true

  ES\_ERROR\_INDEX=

  ES\_OPT\_BYPASS\_MAP\_VALIDATION=false

  ES\_OPT\_DEFAULT\_LIMIT=1000

  SESSION\_DRIVER=redis

  SESSION\_LIFETIME=120

  SESSION\_ENCRYPT=false

  SESSION\_PATH=/

  SESSION\_DOMAIN=null

  BROADCAST\_CONNECTION=log

  FILESYSTEM\_DISK=local

  QUEUE\_CONNECTION=redis

  CACHE\_STORE=redis

  \# CACHE\_PREFIX=

  MEMCACHED\_HOST=127.0.0.1

  REDIS\_CLIENT=phpredis

  REDIS\_HOST=school-redis

  REDIS\_PASSWORD=rjMGJnLH94f9zM0ed162pR2Z

  REDIS\_PORT=6379

  REDIS\_FORWARD\_PORT=6479

  MAIL\_MAILER=log

  MAIL\_SCHEME=null

  MAIL\_HOST=127.0.0.1

  MAIL\_PORT=2525

  MAIL\_USERNAME=null

  MAIL\_PASSWORD=null

  MAIL\_FROM\_ADDRESS="hello@example.com"

  MAIL\_FROM\_NAME="${APP\_NAME}"

  AWS\_ACCESS\_KEY\_ID=

  AWS\_SECRET\_ACCESS\_KEY=

  AWS\_DEFAULT\_REGION=us-east-1

  AWS\_BUCKET=

  AWS\_USE\_PATH\_STYLE\_ENDPOINT=false

  VITE\_APP\_NAME="${APP\_NAME}"

  X\_API\_TOKEN\_EXTERNAL=fDoY3W6D4gE4qH2uMNcZYvQ8Mwdqlk5gsMCXBzV4hHVr9HGRqX

  FACE\_RECOGNITION\_PHOTO\_ENDPOINT=https://beta.edulive.net:16123

  EXTERNAL\_AUTH\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/social

  X\_API\_TOKEN=fDoY3W6D4gE4qH2uMNcZYvQ8Mwdqlk5gsMCXBzV4hHVr9HGRqX

  \#FILE\_STORE\_SERVICE\_ENDPOINT=https://api-beta.edulive.net/social/api

  FILE\_STORE\_SERVICE\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/social/api

  \#FILE\_STORE\_SERVICE\_UPLOAD\_ENDPOINT=https://api-beta.edulive.net/lms/api

  FILE\_STORE\_SERVICE\_UPLOAD\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/lms/api

  DEPARTMENT\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/social/api

  FIREBASE\_SERVICE\_ACCOUNT=firebase.json

  EASY\_QUIZ\_QUESTION\_POINT=1

  NORMAL\_QUIZ\_QUESTION\_POINT=2

  DIFFICULT\_QUIZ\_QUESTION\_POINT=3

  SMART\_CLASS\_DEFAULT\_SERVER=125.212.229.11

  KAFKA\_BROKER=125.212.229.11:19092

  KAFKA\_EXERCISE\_TOPIC=topic\_baitap

  I\_DOCTOR\_API\_KEY=feWck5shKZ2s10DgR1uQ7E40sKhbDGR85PvEgIwGfq4zpQRyna

  ISP\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/social

  SOCIAL\_API\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/social/api

  LMS\_API\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}/lms/api


+ File compose.yaml	

  services:

    school-service:

      image: registry.edulive.net/school-service:latest

      build:

        context: .

        dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile

      container\_name: school-service

      restart: unless-stopped

      volumes:

        \- .:/opt/sources/web

        \- ./docker/supervisord.conf:/etc/supervisor/supervisord.conf

        \- ./docker/php.ini:/usr/local/etc/php/php.ini

      ports:

        \- "${APP\_PORT}:80"

      networks:

        \- school-network

      extra\_hosts:

        \- "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

        \- "school-api.{local dns}:{static ip}"

        \- "storage.{local dns}:{static ip}"

    school-mongo:

      image: mongo:7

      container\_name: school-mongodb

      restart: always

      ports:

        \- '${MONGODB\_FORWARD\_PORT}:27017'

      environment:

        MONGO\_INITDB\_ROOT\_USERNAME: '${MONGODB\_USERNAME}'

        MONGO\_INITDB\_ROOT\_PASSWORD: '${MONGODB\_PASSWORD}'

        MONGO\_INITDB\_DATABASE: '${MONGODB\_DATABASE}'

      volumes:

        \- 'school-mongodb-data:/data/db'

      networks:

        \- school-network

    school-redis:

      image: redis:6.2-alpine

      container\_name: school-redis

      restart: always

      ports:

        \- '${REDIS\_FORWARD\_PORT}:6379'

      command: redis-server \--save 20 1 \--loglevel warning \--requirepass '${REDIS\_PASSWORD}'

      volumes:

        \- 'school-cache-data:/data'

      networks:

        \- school-network

  networks:

      school-network:

          driver: bridge

  volumes:

      school-mongodb-data:

          driver: local

      school-cache-data:

          driver: local


	

+ Khởi động dịch vụ

cd /docker/schools/backend && docker compose up \-d

- # **Cài đặt dịch vụ school frontend** {#cài-đặt-dịch-vụ-school-frontend}

	Sửa cấu hình ở .env và compose.yaml. Ghi đè {local domain} bằng domain cài đặt ở bước II \- 3 và ip là static ip trong cài đặt dns local

+ File /docker/schools/frontend/.env


  NODE\_ENV=development

  PORT=8100

  APP\_SECURE=false

  NEXTAUTH\_URL=.{local dns}

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_URL\_SCHOOL\_CLIENT=http://school.{local dns}

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_URL\_SOCIAL\_CLIENT=http://social.{local dns}

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_RESOURCE\_DOMAIN=http://lib.{local dns}

  NEXTAUTH\_SECRET=kqZnhHKI0qc63rHRuJJyDlFeOPVama8U

  DEBUG\_AUTH=true

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_ADMIN\_PASSWORD=Edulive@123\!@

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_IMAGE=https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_SAVE\_IMAGE=http://storage.{local dns}

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_FILE\_SECRET=edulive\_secret

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_TOOL\_SLIDE=http://tool.{local dns}/slide

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_TINYMCE\_API\_KEY=rdvg5kcztm5c8r1oa1xjizwp1w36hn3g1do7gijro8h0hrqp

  BACKEND\_SCHOOL\_API=http://school-api.{local dns}/api

  BACKEND\_SOCIAL\_API=http://storage.{local dns}/social/api

  BACKEND\_CONTENT\_LMS\_API=http://storage.{local dns}/lms/api

  \#BETA

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_GEN\_AUDIO\_API=http://beta.edulive.net:18050

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_CONTENT\_LOCAL\_API=http://125.212.229.11:7070

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_SOCKET\_URL=ws://192.168.1.90:9622/ws

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_CONTENT\_SOCKET\_URL=https://beta.edulive.net:7123

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_CONTENT\_SOCKET\_TOKEN=nnq962

  NEXT\_PUBLIC\_EDULIVE\_DRAW=http://lib.{local dns}/edulive\_draw/[eldraw.js](http://eldraw.js)


+ File /docker/schools/frontend/compose.yaml

	services:

  school-frontend:

    container\_name: school-frontend

    image: registry.edulive.net/school-frontend:1.0.0

    build:

      context: .

      dockerfile: Dockerfile

    ports:

      \- "3303:8100"

    env\_file:

      \- .env

    networks:

      \- backend\_school-network

    restart: unless-stopped

    extra\_hosts:

      \- "school-api.{local dns}:{static ip}"

networks:

  backend\_school-network:

    external: true

	

+ Khởi động dịch vụ 

  Cd /docker/schools/frontend && docker compose up \-d


- # **Cài đặt dịch vụ social** {#cài-đặt-dịch-vụ-social}

### 	Sửa cấu hình ở .env và compose.yaml. Ghi đè {local domain} bằng domain cài đặt ở bước II \- 3 và ip là static ip trong cài đặt dns local {#sửa-cấu-hình-ở-.env-và-compose.yaml.-ghi-đè-{local-domain}-bằng-domain-cài-đặt-ở-bước-ii---3-và-ip-là-static-ip-trong-cài-đặt-dns-local}

+ File /docker/social/.env

	NEXT\_PUBLIC\_IMAGE=https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_API=http://storage.{local dns}/social/api

NEXTAUTH\_SECRET=dea8764205b545491f4436f42033cb663656db0a1579fe7e0d67cde5d4ba4274

NEXTAUTH\_URL=http://social.{local dns}

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_SAVE\_IMAGE=http://storage.{local dns}

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_CLIENT=http://social.{local dns}

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_FILE\_SECRET=edulive\_secret

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_EDULIVE\_DRAW=http://lib.{local dns}/edulive\_draw/eldraw.js

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_CONTENT=http://storage.{local dns}/lms/api

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_TOOL\_SLIDE=http://tool.{local dns}/slide

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_EDULIVE\_PLAYER=http://player.{local dns}

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_STEP\_AI=http://125.212.229.11:8990/test

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_EDULIVE\_RESOURCE\_DOMAIN=http://lib.{local dns}

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_FONT\_LIST\_URL=https://cdn.edulive.net/fonts/listfonts.json

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_AI\_CONTENT\_GENERATOR\_KEY=5da83771e9908581946d7c6b29e122ff0a7b2bf2f4e8e14248f9f2f27d7ff18b

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_TOOL\_SERVICE\_WEBHOOK\_API=http://tool.{local dns}/api/public/v1/content

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_TOOL\_SERVICE\_WEBHOOK\_TOKEN=2m4FuPp5qqxMi2fOXEZhuUTTXbvftMT0T7ue8VCmmCE63p02h4

NEXT\_PUBLIC\_AI\_CONTENT\_GENERATOR\_API=[https://ai-tool-beta.edulive.net](https://ai-tool-beta.edulive.net)

+ File /docker/social/compose.yaml

  services:

    school-frontend:

      container\_name: social-frontend

      image: [registry.edulive.net/social-frontend:latest](http://registry.edulive.net/social-frontend:latest)

      build:

        context: .

        dockerfile: Dockerfile

      ports:

        \- "3304:8100"

      env\_file:

        \- .env

      extra\_hosts:

        \- "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

        \- "storage.{local dns}:{static ip}"

        \- "lib.{local dns}:{static ip}"

        \- "player.{local dns}:{static ip}"

        \- "tool.{local dns}:{static ip}"

      networks:

        \- backend\_school-network

      restart: unless-stopped

  networks:

    backend\_school-network:

      external: true

+ ### Khởi động dịch vụ {#khởi-động-dịch-vụ}

	Cd /docker/social && docker compose up \-d

- # **Cài đặt các dịch vụ room state** {#cài-đặt-các-dịch-vụ-room-state}

### 	Sửa cấu hình ở docker-compose.yaml. Ghi đè {local domain} bằng domain cài đặt ở bước II \- 3 và ip là static ip trong cài đặt dns local {#sửa-cấu-hình-ở-docker-compose.yaml.-ghi-đè-{local-domain}-bằng-domain-cài-đặt-ở-bước-ii---3-và-ip-là-static-ip-trong-cài-đặt-dns-local}

	Sửa EDGE\_ID={Tên đơn vị để tiện debug khi cần}

+ File /docker/java\_backend/docker-compose.yaml

  configs:

    envfile:

      file: ./env

  services:

    \# Service for the Quarkus application

    room-state-app:

      image: registry.edulive.net/dev/examination:latest

      container\_name: room-state-app

      \# Restart the container if it stops

      restart: unless-stopped

      \# Depends on the 'db' service, ensuring the db starts first

      depends\_on:

        db:

          condition: service\_healthy

        elasticsearch:

          condition: service\_healthy

        otel-collector:

          condition: service\_started

      \# Map port 7070 of the container to port 7070 of the host machine

      ports:

        \- "7070:7070"

      extra\_hosts:

        \- "host.docker.internal:host-gateway"

      \# Map the storage directory so data is not lost when the container is removed

      volumes:

        \- /room-state:/room-state

        \- /room-state/data:/work/data

        \- /room-state/media:/work/media

        \- ./env:/work/env

      \# Configure environment variables to override application.properties

      \# Helps the application connect to the 'db' service

      environment:

        \# PostgreSQL connection configuration

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_DB\_KIND=postgresql

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_JDBC\_URL=jdbc:postgresql://db:5432/room\_state

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_USERNAME=edulive

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_PASSWORD=edulive@123def

        \- DEPARTMENT\_ID=1002

        \- STORAGES\_DIR=/room-state/data

        \- STORAGES\_DIR\_MEDIA=/room-state/media

        \# Configure third party API

        \- SOCIAL\_SERVER\_URL=http://social-app:8082

        \- SCHOOL\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=http://host.docker.internal:8002

        \- LMS\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=http://lms-app:8083

        \- CENTER\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=disabled

        \- SOCIAL\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=http://social-app:8082

        \- DRAW\_LIB\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=null

        \- DRAW\_LIB\_FILE\_NAME=eldraw.js

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_\_AI\_WRAPPER\_SERVER\_API\_\_URL=http://host.docker.internal:5000

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_\_AI\_WRAPPER\_SERVER\_API\_\_CONNECT\_TIMEOUT=120000

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_\_AI\_WRAPPER\_SERVER\_API\_\_READ\_TIMEOUT=600000

        \- OLLAMA\_MODEL\_NAME=gpt-oss:20b

        \- STORAGE\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=http://seaweedfs-filer:8888/dev-esocial

        \- LEARNING\_ASSESSMENT\_SERVER\_API\_MP\_REST\_URL=http://123.31.43.23:8504

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_LANGUAGE\_TOOL\_SERVER\_API\_URL=http://languagetool:8010

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_OLLAMA\_SERVER\_API\_URL=http://host.docker.internal:21434

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_OLLAMA\_SERVER\_API\_CONNECT\_TIMEOUT=120000

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_OLLAMA\_SERVER\_API\_READ\_TIMEOUT=300000

        \- JANUS\_SERVER\_URL=\["ws://{local dns}:8188/ws"\]

        \- EDGE\_SERVER\_HOST=http://{local dns}

        \- QUARKUS\_OTEL\_SERVICE\_NAME=examination-Dev-254

        \- QUARKUS\_OTEL\_EXPORTER\_OTLP\_ENDPOINT=http://otel-collector:4317

        \- QUARKUS\_ELASTICSEARCH\_HOSTS=elasticsearch:9200

        \- STORAGE\_SERVER\_URL=http://seaweedfs-filer:8888/dev-esocial/

        \- STORAGE\_SERVER\_EXTERNAL\_URL=http://storage.{local dns}/

        \- QUARKUS\_REST\_CLIENT\_DRAW\_LIB\_API\_URL=https://lib.edulive.net

    lms-app:

      image: registry.edulive.net/dev/lms:latest

      container\_name: lms-app

      restart: unless-stopped

      depends\_on:

        db:

          condition: service\_healthy

      ports:

        \- "8083:8083"

      volumes:

        \- /lms:/lms

        \- /lms/images:/lms/images

      environment:

        \# PostgreSQL connection

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_DB\_KIND=postgresql

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_JDBC\_URL=jdbc:postgresql://db:5432/lms

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_USERNAME=edulive

        \- QUARKUS\_DATASOURCE\_PASSWORD=edulive@123def

        \- EDULIVE\_STORAGES\_IMAGE\_DIR=/lms/images

        \# Configure third party API

        \- MINIO\_PORT=18888

        \- MINIO\_SERVER=seaweedfs-filer

        \- MINIO\_RESOURCE\_BUCKET=dev-esocial

        \- MINIO\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}

        \- MINIO\_FILER\_ENDPOINT=http://storage.{local dns}

        \- SECRET\_JWT\_TOKEN=YWU5MmQxMWJmODMwMmVhOGQwZDFiNTU2YWI5OTIwNzg1ODhiOTZmNjQ0Y2YwZjRhODJjYzA0Y2M3NGFjYWZlODk2ODVmYTg0Yjc4NzQ1NjRhY2MzOGZiNWFiYjVhOGQwNzhmYmRhMzYyZTlkODBiZDYyMTc1YTkwMjNiMmRkMWY=

        \- QUARKUS\_ELASTICSEARCH\_HOSTS=elasticsearch:9200

        \- QUARKUS\_OTEL\_SERVICE\_NAME=lms-Dev-254

        \- QUARKUS\_OTEL\_EXPORTER\_OTLP\_ENDPOINT=http://otel-collector:4317

    social-app:

      image: registry.edulive.net/dev/social:latest

      container\_name: social-app

      \# Restart the container if it stops

      restart: unless-stopped

      \# Depends on the 'db' service, ensuring the db starts first

      depends\_on:

        db:

          condition: service\_healthy

      \# Map port 7070 of the container to port 7070 of the host machine

      ports:

        \- "8082:8082"

      \# Configure environment variables to override application.properties

      \# Helps the application connect to the 'db' service

      environment:

        \- SPRING\_APPLICATION\_NAME=social-Dev-254

        \- SPRING\_PROFILES\_ACTIVE=dev,api-docs

        \# PostgreSQL connection configuration

        \- SPRING\_DATASOURCE\_URL=jdbc:postgresql://db:5432/social

        \- SPRING\_DATASOURCE\_USERNAME=edulive

        \- SPRING\_DATASOURCE\_PASSWORD=edulive@123def

        \- JHIPSTER\_CORS\_ALLOWED\_ORIGINS='http://localhost:8100,https://localhost:8100,https://social-beta.edulive.net,https://school-beta.edulive.net,https://api-beta.edulive.net,http://social.{local dns}, http://school.{local dns}, http://content.{local dns}, http://{local dns}, http://tool.{local dns}, http://school-api.{local dns}, http://storage.{local dns}'

        \- MINIO\_ENDPOINT=http://seaweedfs-filer:8888

        \- MINIO\_SERVER=seaweedfs-filer

        \- MINIO\_PORT=18888

        \- MINIO\_BUCKET=dev-esocial

        \# Top-level LMS properties

        \- LMS\_ENDPOINT=http://lms-app:8083

        \- LMS\_CONTENT\_PATH=/api/integration/contents/{contentId}

        \- LMS\_CONTENT\_SNAPSHOT\_PATH=/api/integration/content-snapshot/{snapshotId}/read-zip

        \- LMS\_API\_SECRET\_KEY=gG7XyBAJZ2M3kc0UqNhr

        \# Nested storage.client properties

        \- LMS\_STORAGE\_CLIENT\_BASE\_URL=http://lms-app:8083

        \- LMS\_STORAGE\_CLIENT\_API\_KEY=gG7XyBAJZ2M3kc0UqNhr

        \- LMS\_STORAGE\_CLIENT\_CONNECT\_TIMEOUT=5000

        \- LMS\_STORAGE\_CLIENT\_READ\_TIMEOUT=30000

    \# Service for the PostgreSQL database

    db:

      image: registry.edulive.net/postgres:17.5-alpine

      container\_name: postgres-multi-db

      restart: unless-stopped

      environment:

        POSTGRES\_USER: edulive

        POSTGRES\_PASSWORD: edulive@123def

        POSTGRES\_MULTIPLE\_DATABASES: room\_state,lms,social,filer\_metadata

      volumes:

        \- ./init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d

        \- pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

      ports:

        \- "15432:5432"

      healthcheck:

        test: \[ "CMD-SHELL", "pg\_isready \-U edulive \-d room\_state" \]

        interval: 5s

        timeout: 5s

        retries: 5

    elasticsearch:

      image: registry.edulive.net/docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:9.0.2

      container\_name: elasticsearch

      restart: unless-stopped

      environment:

        \- node.name=es01

        \- cluster.name=es-docker-cluster

        \- discovery.type=single-node

        \- bootstrap.memory\_lock=true

        \# Uncomment and set these if enabling security

        \# \- xpack.security.enabled=true

        \# \- ELASTIC\_PASSWORD=changeme

        \- "ES\_JAVA\_OPTS=-Xms1g \-Xmx1g"

        \- xpack.security.enabled=false

      ulimits:

        memlock:

          soft: \-1

          hard: \-1

      ports:

        \- "9200:9200"

      healthcheck:

        test: \[ "CMD-SHELL", "curl \-s \-f http://localhost:9200/\_cluster/health?wait\_for\_status=yellow\&timeout=5s" \]

        interval: 10s

        timeout: 10s

        retries: 5

    \# OpenTelemetry Collector \- The heart of our setup

    otel-collector:

      image: otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:0.133.0

      user: "0:0"

      container\_name: otel-collector

      restart: unless-stopped

      volumes:

        \- ./otel-collector-config.yml:/etc/otelcol-contrib/config.yaml

        \- /var/log/nginx:/var/log/nginx:ro

        \- otel-storage:/var/lib/otelcol/storage

      environment:

        \- EDGE\_ID=254

      ports:

        \- "4317:4317" \# OTLP gRPC receiver

        \- "4318:4318" \# OTLP HTTP receiver

    

    \# Seaweedfs

    \# 1\. Master Server Service

    seaweedfs-master:

      image: chrislusf/seaweedfs:latest

      container\_name: seaweed\_master

      command: 'master \-ip.bind=0.0.0.0 \-mdir=/seaweedfs/master\_data'

      ports:

        \- "9333:9333" \# Port for Master Web UI and API

        \- "19333:19333" \# gRPC Port

      volumes:

        \- /seaweedfs/master\_data:/seaweedfs/master\_data \# Volume to store Master metadata

      healthcheck:

        test: \["CMD", "wget", "--spider", "-q", "http://localhost:9333/cluster/status"\]

        interval: 30s

        timeout: 20s

        retries: 5

      restart: always

    \# 2\. Volume Server Service (ONLY ONE)

    seaweedfs-volume1:

      image: chrislusf/seaweedfs:latest

      container\_name: seaweed\_volume1

      \# Command remains the same

      command: 'volume \-dir=/seaweedfs/data \-port=8080 \-compactionMBps=100 \-index=memory \-mserver=seaweedfs-master:9333'

      ports:

        \- "18080:8080" \# Port for data access (HTTP)

      volumes:

        \# Volume to store actual file data

        \- /seaweedfs/data:/seaweedfs/data

      environment:

        \# Declare the Master Server address for the Volume to connect to

        WEED\_MASTER: seaweedfs-master:9333

      depends\_on:

        seaweedfs-master:

          condition: service\_healthy

      restart: always

    \# 3\. Filer Server Service

    seaweedfs-filer:

      image: chrislusf/seaweedfs:latest

      container\_name: seaweed\_filer

      \# Configure Filer to connect to Master and use Postgres as the metadata store

      command: \>

        filer 

        \-master=seaweedfs-master:9333 

        \-ip=seaweedfs-filer

        \-ip.bind=0.0.0.0

        \-port=8888 

        \-port.grpc=18888

      ports:

        \- "8888:8888" \# Port for the File System/S3 API interface

        \- "18888:18888"

      volumes:

        \- ./filer.toml:/etc/seaweedfs/filer.toml \# Filer configuration file

      depends\_on:

        seaweedfs-master:

          condition: service\_healthy \# Đảm bảo Master đã qua Healthcheck

        seaweedfs-volume1:

          condition: service\_started

        db:

          condition: service\_healthy

      healthcheck:

        test: \["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8888/metrics"\]

        interval: 30s

        timeout: 10s

        retries: 3

        start\_period: 60s

      restart: always

  \# Define the named volume for storing database data

  volumes:

    pgdata:

    otel-storage:

+ ### Khởi động dịch vụ {#khởi-động-dịch-vụ-1}

  Cd /docker/java-backend 

  docker compose up \-d

1) ### Kiểm tra dịch vụ chạy  {#kiểm-tra-dịch-vụ-chạy}

      sudo docker ps 

Nếu trạng thái docker chạy thành công : 

2) ### Thực hiện Import database {#thực-hiện-import-database}

#### Copy backup file vào container {#copy-backup-file-vào-container}

sudo docker cp /docker/backup\_school\_20260120\_094653.sql school-service-postgres:/tmp

#### Import vào database {#import-vào-database}

sudo docker exec \-u postgres school-service-postgres psql \-U school \-d school \-f /tmp/backup\_school\_20260120\_094653.sql

# **IV. Cấu hình wowza streamer** {#iv.-cấu-hình-wowza-streamer}

1. ### Truy cập [http://player-admin.{local dns}/enginemanager/login.htm](http://player-admin.sv17.edu/enginemanager/login.htm)  {#truy-cập-http://player-admin.{local-dns}/enginemanager/login.htm}

Nhập tài khoản Admin/edulive@12345

![][image6]

2. ### Vào Application rồi click Add Application để tạo mới {#vào-application-rồi-click-add-application-để-tạo-mới}

![][image7]

3. ### Chọn VOD Edege {#chọn-vod-edege}

   ![][image8]

   

4\. Nhập tên esocial (Bắt buộc chính xác) 

![][image9]

4. Tạo media cache 

Vào menu Server \> Media Cache để thêm

![][image10]

Chọn tab source và Add Media Cache

![][image11]

Source name: minio\_http (Bắt buộc chính xác)

Prefix: http/

Base Path: [http://{ser](http://{ser)ver static ip}:8888/dev-esocial/

Các thông số khác để default

Ví dụ như hình

	![][image12]

Lưu lại 

6\. Update media cache cho application

Quay lại menu Application \> esocial và chọn edit

![][image13]

Mục Media cache source chọn: Some Media Cache Sources are available (select from the following list):

Ở trên list media cache chọn minio\_http và lưu lại

![][image14]

Khởi động lại Application

![][image15]

[image5]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image6]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image7]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image8]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image9]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image10]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image11]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image12]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image13]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image14]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image15]: <data:image/png;base64,>
